eng.title: Dark Flame Fragment
eng.description: Draw 1 card, then discard 2 cards. Discard: Discard 1 card.

zhs.title: 暗焰残页
zhs.description: 抽 1 张牌，然后弃 2 张牌。弃牌触发：再弃 1 张牌。

eng.title: Swift Cut
eng.description: Deal 6 damage. Discard: Deal 7 damage to a random enemy.

zhs.title: 迅影斩
zhs.description: 造成 6 点伤害。弃牌触发：对随机敌人造成 7 点伤害。

eng.title: Toxin Record
eng.description: Apply 5 poison stacks. Discard: Apply 3 poison stacks to all enemies.

zhs.title: 毒素记录
zhs.description: 施加 5 层中毒。弃牌触发：对所有敌人施加 3 层中毒。

eng.title: Shattered Echo
eng.description: Draw 2 cards, then discard 2 cards. Discard: Draw 1 card, then discard 1 card.

zhs.title: 破碎回响
zhs.description: 抽 2 张牌，然后弃 2 张牌。弃牌触发：抽 1 张牌，然后弃 1 张牌。

eng.title: Ashen Aegis
eng.description: Gain 8 Block, then discard 1 card. Discard: Gain 10 Block.

zhs.title: 灰烬庇护
zhs.description: 获得 8 点格挡，然后弃 1 张牌。弃牌触发：获得 10 点格挡。

eng.title: Crippling Manuscript
eng.description: Apply 2 Weak and 2 Vulnerable. Discard: Apply 1 Weak and 1 Vulnerable to all enemies.

zhs.title: 崩坏手稿
zhs.description: 施加 2 层虚弱和 2 层易伤。弃牌触发：对所有敌人施加 1 层虚弱和 1 层易伤。

eng.title: Ember Volley
eng.description: Deal 4 damage 3 times. Discard: Deal 4 damage twice to a random enemy.

zhs.title: 余烬连射
zhs.description: 造成 4 点伤害 3 次。弃牌触发：对随机敌人造成 4 点伤害 2 次。

eng.title: Recall Surge
eng.description: Return a card from your discard pile to your hand. Discard: Choose a card from your discard pile and return it to your hand, draw 1, discard 1, then place 1 card on top of your draw pile.

zhs.title: 回收思路
zhs.description: 将弃牌堆中一张牌归还手牌。弃牌触发：从弃牌堆选 1 张归还手牌，抽 1 弃 1，然后将手牌中 1 张置于牌堆顶。

eng.title: Fading Formula
eng.description: Deal 10 damage and gain 10 Block. If this remains in your hand at end of turn, discard it and trigger its discard effect. Discard: If this is your odd-numbered discard this turn, deal 18 damage to a random enemy. If this is your even-numbered discard this turn, gain 18 Block.

zhs.title: 褪色公式
zhs.description: 对一个敌人造成 10 点伤害并获得 10 点格挡。回合结束时若仍在手牌中，将其弃掉并触发其弃牌效果。弃牌触发：若这是你本回合第奇数次弃牌，对随机敌人造成 18 点伤害；若这是你本回合第偶数次弃牌，获得 18 点格挡。

eng.title: Final Draft
eng.description: Deal 16 damage. Discard: Deal 10 damage to all enemies. For each card discarded at or beyond the 3rd this turn, deal 3 more (max +9).

zhs.title: 终稿余烬
zhs.description: 造成 16 点伤害。弃牌触发：对所有敌人造成 10 点伤害。本回合第 3 次起每多弃 1 张牌，额外造成 3 点伤害（最多 +9）。

eng.title: Dark Momentum
eng.description: Apply 1 Dark Momentum (threshold 3). Every 3 card-effect discards, gain 1 Energy.

zhs.title: 暗涌动能
zhs.description: 施加 1 层暗涌动能（阈值 3）。每弃掉 3 张牌，获得 1 点能量。

eng.title: Ash Veil
eng.description: Apply 3 Ash Veil. Each card-effect discard, gain 3 Block.

zhs.title: 灰烬面纱
zhs.description: 施加 3 层灰烬面纱。每次弃牌，获得 3 点格挡。

eng.title: Void Surge
eng.description: Apply 1 Void Surge. Each card-effect discard, deal 3 damage twice to a random enemy.

zhs.title: 虚空涌动
zhs.description: 施加 1 层虚空涌动。每次弃牌，对随机敌人造成 3 点伤害两次。

eng.title: Dark Momentum
eng.description: Every !A! card-effect discards this turn, gain 1 Energy.
eng.smartDescription: Every !A! card-effect discards this turn, gain 1 Energy.

zhs.title: 暗涌动能
zhs.description: 本回合每弃掉 !A! 张牌，获得 1 点能量。
zhs.smartDescription: 本回合每弃掉 !A! 张牌，获得 1 点能量。

zhs.title: 灰烬面纱
zhs.description: 每次弃牌，获得 !A! 点格挡。
zhs.smartDescription: 每次弃牌，获得 !A! 点格挡。

eng.title: Void Surge
eng.description: Each card-effect discard, deal !A! damage twice to a random enemy.
eng.smartDescription: Each card-effect discard, deal !A! damage twice to a random enemy.

zhs.title: 虚空涌动
zhs.description: 每次弃牌，对随机敌人造成 !A! 点伤害两次。
zhs.smartDescription: 每次弃牌，对随机敌人造成 !A! 点伤害两次。
